description: Details of the Council's members and register of interests.

details.body:
The members are senior figures from the fields of science, engineering and technology. They are appointed by the Prime Minister, in line with guidance from the Office of the Commissioner for Public Appointments. CST invites non-members to join sub-groups to advise on specific pieces of work.

Chairs

  • Professor Dame Angela McLean DBE, FRS - Government Chief Scientific Adviser
  • Lord Browne of Madingley FRS, FREng - Senior Advisor on Climate and Net Zero, General Atlantic; Chairman of the Francis Crick Institute; Fellow and former President of the Royal Academy of Engineering

Members

  • Professor Julia Black CBE FBA FRSA - Warden of Nuffield College, Oxford
  • Avid Larizadeh Duggan OBE - Senior Managing Director, Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan, Teachers’ Venture Growth
  • Mark Enzer OBE FREng FIChemE FICE - Strategic Advisor, Mott MacDonald; Visiting Professor, University of Cambridge and Imperial College London
  • Professor Dame Lynn Gladden DBE FREng FRS - Shell Professor of Chemical Engineering, University of Cambridge
  • Professor Jim Hall FREng FICE - Professor of Climate and Environmental Risks, University of Oxford
  • Saul Klein OBE - Co-founder and Managing Partner, Phoenix Court
  • Priya Lakhani OBE - Founder CEO, CENTURY-Tech
  • Sir John Lazar CBE FREng - President, Royal Academy of Engineering (ex-officio member)
  • Professor (Emeritus) Nick McKeown FREng - Professor of Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, Stanford University
  • Professor Andrew Morris CBE FRSE FMedSci – President, Academy of Medical Sciences (ex-officio member)
  • Sir Paul Nurse OM CH FMedSci PRS - President, Royal Society (ex-officio member)
  • Professor Sir Nigel Shadbolt FRS FREng FBCS - Professor of Computing Science at the University of Oxford; Principal of Jesus College, Oxford; Co-Founder and Chair of the Open Data Institute
  • Professor Sarah Sharples FREng CErgHF FIET FIEHF - Vice President and Dean of the Faculty of Science and Engineering, University of Manchester
  • Richard Slater - Chief R&D Officer, Unilever
  • Professor Susan J Smith FBA - President, British Academy (ex-officio member)
  • Paul Taylor CBE FREng - Director, Morgan Stanley International

‘Ex-officio members’ are people who become members automatically because they hold a particular office.

Observers

  • Dr Dave Smith - National Technology Adviser
  • Alexandra Jones - Director General, Science and Innovation at the Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT)
  • Jessica Glover - Director General, Growth and Productivity at HM Treasury

Register of interests

Members are required to declare any personal, political or business interests that could, or could be seen to, influence their judgement.

  • CST register of members’ interests

change_history.note: Professor Sarah Sharples has been added to the list of members as she is now a member of the Council for Science and Technology.
The webpage link for Professor Andrew Morris has been updated.
Professor Brooke Rogers has been removed from the list of members as she is no longer a Council for Science and Technology (CST) member.

Professor Sir Adrian Smith has been removed from the list of members as he is no longer an ex-officio member as he is no longer President of the Royal Society. Sir Paul Nurse has been added to the list of members as he is now an ex-officio member as President of the Royal Society.

The webpage link for Julia Black has been updated and references to her as President of the British Academy have been removed as she is no longer President of the British Academy but continues as a member of the council.

Professor Susan J Smith has been added to the list of members as the new President of the British Academy and ex-officio member of the council.
Ottoline Leyser has been removed from list of members because she is no longer a member of CST.
Update of title for Sir John Lazar.

Updated to remove previous members of CST: Professor Muffy Calder, Suranga Chandratillake, Professor Max Lu, Professor Paul Newman, Professor Dame Carol Propper, Professor Keith Ridgway, Paul Stein, Lord Stern of Brentford.

Updated to add Avid Larizadeh Duggan, Mark Enzer, Professor Dame Lynn Gladden, Priya Lakhani, Professor (Emeritus) Nick McKeown, Professor Sir Nigel Shadbolt, Richard Slater, Paul Taylor.

Updated entry for Professor Julia Black and Professor Sir Adrian Smith.
John Lazar, President of the Royal Academy of Engineering, added to membership.
Updated the list of members following the appointment of Professor Andrew Morris as President of the Academy of Medical Sciences (ex-officio).

Dr Dave Smith, National Technology Adviser has been added as a government observer to CST. Professor Dame Fiona Murray has been removed from the list of CST members as she has completed her final term.
Have changed names where people have left roles and been replaced.
Updated Professor Dame Angela McLean as Chair and GCSA, updated departments to Department for Science, Innovation and Technology.
Removed outgoing CST members and added Professor Dame Carol Propper and Professor Keith Ridgeway.
Removed Charles Roxburgh as HMT observer.
Updated Saul Klein organisational details and added Susannah Storey under Observers.
Updated membership list April 2021.
Sir Mark Walport is no longer an ex officio member of the Council.
List updated to include new members.
Membership updated to include Jo Shanmugalingam, Director General, Industrial Strategy, Science and Innovation at the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy.
Removal of Dr Michael Lynch following his resignation from CST.
Removed Prof Sir Mark Walport's name, as he is no longer Government Chief Scientific Adviser.
First published.

title: Membership
